case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ CALDERON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ CALDERON DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $118.77 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,011.66 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, JONATHAN A HERNANDEZ $862.00 PRINCIPAL, $118.77 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.77, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: 848 PRINCIPAL BALANCE PLUS ONE LATE FEE PLUS INTEREST PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
